title: Sub-decree no.01 on reclassification and donation of state property
description: Sub-decree no.01 on reclassfication and donation of state property which is the subdivision of state public property, including land from the Pursat Provincial Hall located in Peal Nheaek Pir village, Phteah Prey commune, Pursat city, to 40 families and 5 departments/units with a total land area of 19,608 square meters, and land from the Old Market located in Chamkar Chek Khang Cheung village, Phteah Prey commune, Pursat city, to 140 families residing there, and 4 departments/units with a total land area of 8,5832 square meters.
